rationale: Acting on Review 1's renaming of the three Prop classes (AffineAlgGroup/ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup → Is*) and AlgPoints produces a more consistent, future-proof result (matches IsUnipotent + IsAlgClosed in the same diff and file imports); the True-field and lemma issues are also real naming overstatements grounded in the diff. Review 2's blanket approve leaves the obvious internal inconsistency untouched, so the PR outcome is inferior.
